name: Flagle
description: Guess the country flag based on geographical indicators and flag overlays.

name: Timeguessr
description: Deduce the precise location and historical year of random photographs.

name: travle
description: Find the shortest transit path between two countries by naming border links.

name: Daily Orbs
description: Solve a daily trivia puzzle by identifying connecting target layers.

name: Seldom
description: Identify obscure general knowledge targets based on narrowing clues.

name: Countdown
description: Face the classic clock challenge to solve letter anagrams and number math matrices.

name: Bandle
description: Identify popular musical tracks from isolated instrumental layers.

name: Songless
description: Guess the target music artist using sparse clues and limited structural reveals.

name: Heardle
description: Name the daily track by listening to progressively longer audio intro clips.

name: Clue Raider
description: Use cryptic data coordinates and deep logic to crack the hidden daily code.

name: Clues by Sam
description: Break down intricate logical deduction grids to uncover a hidden solution matrix.

name: Wiki Speedrun
description: Navigate between arbitrary Wikipedia entries in the fewest possible link clicks.

name: Redactle
description: Uncover hidden terms and context in an entirely redacted Wikipedia article.

name: PuzzGrid
description: Group sixteen items into four related conceptual connections against a tight timer.

name: Nounable
description: Guess the daily secret noun using strategic conceptual indicators.

name: Semantle
description: Find the daily hidden word using semantic similarity score data.

name: Car Connections
description: Find groups of automotive facts, specs, or models that share an underlying theme.

name: Cardle
description: Deduce the vehicle make and model from zoomed-in physical frame captures.

name: Actorle
description: Guess the daily actor by parsing through an anonymised list of their IMDb filmography.

name: Guardian Cryptic Crossword
description: Solve intricate, multi-layered wordplay clues in the classic British newspaper layout.

name: Lexis Rex French
description: Test and build foreign vocabulary with daily custom word grids and language puzzles.
